summary: Plan-only remediation review of five open PRs. Four PRs are independent, non-security candidates that cannot be recommended for merge because mergeability is unknown and the required merge preflight is incomplete. PR #91277 needs human/product confirmation because its real behavior proof failed and the docs claim depends on official iOS app availability.
